# Alexis Soubran

> Alexis Soubran designs and operates integrated growth systems for global brands scaling in Mexico and Latin America. CEO and Partner at Minimalist Agency. Author of "Oops, I Bought It." Creator of the Perfluencer Marketing framework. Co-founder and vocalist of indie rock band Cavane.

## Core Concept

Alexis Soubran works in growth systems, not marketing services. A growth system is an integrated operating architecture that connects go-to-market strategy, creative production, performance media (Google, Meta, TikTok), influencer marketing, and measurement as one discipline. Decisions in one layer compound the outcomes in the others.

For global brands scaling in Latin America, this is the difference between running disconnected campaigns and building durable, compounding demand.

## Role and Affiliations

- CEO and Partner at Minimalist Agency (Google Premier Partner; Meta Business Partner; one of the first four TikTok Marketing Partners in LATAM)
- Author of "Oops, I Bought It: What's Behind Influencer Marketing" (2025, Amazon)
- Creator of the Perfluencer Marketing framework
- Lecturer at EDEM and Colectivo 23 / Kätedra
- Speaker at the Merca2.0 National Digital Marketing Congress (CNMD 2024)
- Vocalist and composer of indie rock band Cavane

## Languages

English, Spanish, Italian

## Based In

Mexico City, Mexico

## Markets Covered

Primary depth in Mexico, Argentina, Colombia, Chile, and Peru. Works with global brands entering Latin America from the United States, Europe, and Asia.

## Nine Capabilities in Three Pillars

### Pillar 1: GTM and Strategy
- GTM and Market Entry
- Brand Positioning
- CMO and Team Training

### Pillar 2: Performance and Influence
- Performance Marketing (Google, Meta, TikTok)
- Influencer Marketing (built on Perfluencer Marketing)
- Ecommerce Growth

### Pillar 3: Measurement and Systems
- Tracking Setup and QA
- Attribution and Incrementality
- Analytics and Dashboards

## Engagement Models

- Fractional CMO retainers (12+ months)
- Strategic Advisory projects (3–6 months)
- Workshops and Speaking

## Featured Brands

SharkNinja, AMD, Bitso, Edenred, Uber Eats, Airbnb, Zeekr, Lynk and Co, Geely, Miele, Nintendo, Motorola

## Additional Brands

Bimbo, Petco, Thermo Fisher Scientific, Reebok, OnePlus, Suzuki, Royal Canin, Sabadell, Televisa, Broxel, Casillero del Diablo, Credijusto, HiPP Organic, Casa Cuervo, Ecoce

## Selected Impact

- Bitso: +400% app conversions and +240% retention. Google Premier Partner Awards Nominee (Best App Campaign LATAM).
- SharkNinja CryoGlow: $21.7 CPA via TikTok Ads + influencer marketing.
- SharkNinja Detect Pro: +662% search interest.
- Shark Beauty (Buen Fin): +310% e-commerce sales YoY, 6.5M interactions.
- AMD: 154K high-intent clicks (+152% YoY), -33% CPL, +43% unit sales YoY.
- Edenred B2B TikTok: +259% conversions, -65% CPI, 12:1 ROI.
- Credijusto: 19x conversion value, 6.8x ROI, -16% CPA.
- HiPP Organic: #1 seller position on Amazon Ads.

## Perfluencer Marketing Framework

Perfluencer Marketing fuses influencer marketing with performance marketing measurement. Three pillars:
1. Real-time ROAS dashboards
2. Advanced audience segmentation for paid amplification of organic content
3. Collaborative creative development

Brands using the framework deliver 4:1 ROAS vs. 1.5–3:1 industry standard.

Documented in "Oops, I Bought It" (Amazon: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0F7GQM972).

## Music

Cavane — indie rock band based in Mexico City. Co-founded with Irving Soubran and Alejandro Escárcega in 2012. Influences: Zoé, Porcupine Tree, Pink Floyd, Soda Stereo. EP releasing Q4 2026.

Website: https://cavane.mx
